conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "cloud_run_revision" AND resource.labels.service_name = monitoring.regex.full_match("counselconduit.*") AND metric.type = "run.googleapis.com/request_count" AND metric.labels.response_code_class = "5xx"

documentation.content: CounselConduit is returning 5xx errors above the threshold. Check Cloud Run logs: https://console.cloud.google.com/logs?project=shadowtag-omega-v4
